meta.summary: Tandem Repeats Finder command-line tool for detecting tandem repeats in FASTA sequences.
meta.description: Tandem Repeats Finder command-line tool for detecting tandem repeats in FASTA sequences.

test: trf -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tandem Repeats Finder, Version 4.09' >/dev/null && { trf 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Please use:' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v trf) | grep -F libc >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trf-ngs && cd /tmp/taf-trf-ngs && printf '>chr1
ACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACAC
>chr2
TTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGG
' > tiny.fa && trf tiny.fa 2 7 7 80 10 20 20 -ngs > repeats.dat && grep -F '@chr1' repeats.dat >/dev/null && grep -F '@chr2' repeats.dat >/dev/null && grep -F 'TTTAGGG' repeats.dat >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trf-files && cd /tmp/taf-trf-files && printf '>chr1
ACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACAC
>chr2
TTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGG
' > tiny.fa && { trf tiny.fa 2 7 7 80 10 20 20 -d -m -h > run.out 2>run.err || true; } && test -s tiny.fa.2.7.7.80.10.20.20.dat && test -s tiny.fa.2.7.7.80.10.20.20.mask && grep -F 'Sequence: chr1' tiny.fa.2.7.7.80.10.20.20.dat >/dev/null && grep -F 'NNNN' tiny.fa.2.7.7.80.10.20.20.mask >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trf-html && cd /tmp/taf-trf-html && printf '>chr1
ACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACACAC
>chr2
TTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGGTTTAGGG
' > tiny.fa && { trf tiny.fa 2 7 7 80 10 20 20 > run.out 2>run.err || true; } && test -s tiny.fa.2.7.7.80.10.20.20.summary.html && test -s tiny.fa.s1.2.7.7.80.10.20.20.1.html && grep -F 'Tandem Repeats Finder' tiny.fa.2.7.7.80.10.20.20.summary.html >/dev/null
